zh.lifeSummary: Mary Smythe是William Smythe的女兒，於大約1535年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾史盧比。她於大約1549年與John Symkinson在英國越可爾多卡斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1567年在她的家鄉享年34歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾史盧比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Smythe是William Smythe的女儿，于大约1535年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾史盧比。她于大约1549年与John Symkinson在英国越可爾多卡斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1567年在她的家乡享年34岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾史盧比。

nameMeanings.name: Smythe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Smith
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Smythe was born about 1535, in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England as the daughter of William Smythe. She married John Symkinson about 1549, in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1567, in her hometown, at the age of 34, and was buried in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Smythe est née environ 1535, à Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, fille de William Smythe. Elle a épousé John Symkinson environ 1549, à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1567, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Smythe wurde um 1535 in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, als Tochter von William Smythe geboren. Sie hat um 1549 in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England John Symkinson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1567 im Alter von 34 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Smythe è nata il circa 1535 nel Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England come figlia di William Smythe. Lei sposato John Symkinson circa 1549, nel Doncaster, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1567, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Smytheは約1535年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスクルービーでWilliam Smytheの娘として生まれた。約1549年にイギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターでJohn Symkinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1567年に故郷で34歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスクルービーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Smythe(은)는 대략 1535년 영국 노틴그함실르 스크루비에서 William Smythe의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1549년 영국 요르크실르 돈카스터에서 John Symkinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1567년 그녀의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 스크루비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Smythe nasceu aproximadamente 1535, em Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra filha de William Smythe. Ela casou-se com John Symkinson aproximadamente 1549, em Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1567, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Smythe родилась около 1535 г. в местности скруби, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Её отца звали William Smythe. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Symkinson около 1549 г. в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1567 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности скруби, ноттингхамшир, Англия.
